description:
Advances: mutagen.test_selection, mutagen.coverage

Follow-up to mutagen-wrd.25 closing F19 (TestSelector.scan_for_tag re-reads test tree from disk on every --tests tag:foo invocation).

Background: F19 was descoped from .25 per mutagen.decision.f19_descoped because (a) phase_tests runs BEFORE phase_ast_cache in lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex, so the cache cannot serve scan_for_tag without a workaround; (b) the proposed `:persistent_term` workaround introduces a second cache mechanism not asked for by the spec and breaks `async: true` test isolation.

Deliverable:
Investigate and implement one of:
  (Option A — recommended) Re-order `phase_tests` and `phase_ast_cache` so the cache exists before scan_for_tag runs. Ripple effects on test-filter pipeline must be mapped and verified.
  (Option B) Cache TestSelector tag-scan results in a per-run map threaded through cfg (NOT `:persistent_term`).

After implementation, `TestSelector.scan_for_tag/2` (test_selector.ex:343-367) reads from the cache (or per-run map) instead of walking the test tree from disk.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: existing TestSelector tests still green; new test "scan_for_tag does not call File.read! when cache is hot"
- Behaviors to demonstrate: invoking `mix mutagen --tests tag:foo` twice in the same VM session results in one (not two) test-tree walks

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/mutagen_ex/beam_cache.ex (already landed in .25)
- lib/mutagen_ex/ast.ex (already landed in .25)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/** (do not modify mutators)
Allowed touches:
- lib/mutagen_ex/test_selector.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex (only if Option A and the cache surface needs minor adjustment for the new phase order)
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (phase order)
- test/mutagen_ex/test_selector_test.exs
- .spec/specs/test_selection.spec.md
- CHANGELOG.md

Out of Scope (intent):
- DO NOT use `:persistent_term` for the tag-to-file mapping. This was explicitly rejected during .25 planning per mutagen.decision.f19_descoped. Use either a phase reorder OR a per-run map threaded via cfg.
- DO NOT break determinism (mutagen.r2). Tag-resolved file lists must be deterministically ordered.

Merge gate:
- [ ] `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` green
- [ ] `mix test` green
- [ ] Determinism test green (from .25.00)
- [ ] No second tree walk on repeated `--tests tag:foo`
- [ ] No `:persistent_term` usage in test_selector.ex
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Priority: P3 (lower than .25 stages; should land soon after .25 closes but is not a merge gate for `epic/mutagen-wrd` -> `main`).
title: F19 follow-up: TestSelector tag cache (descoped from .25)
